title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Myntra International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Myntra International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Myntra International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Myntra International Enterprises:
Myntra International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra International Enterprises!
